views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's focus stats, daily goal progress ring, current streak, session breakdown by category, and a quick-add FAB for logging sessions

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-entry modal with task name, duration stepper (default 25min pomodoro), category/type pickers, quality slider, distraction counter, and completion toggle

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Date-grouped session list with category filter chips, showing duration, task, quality dots, and completion status per entry. Includes a calendar heatmap colored by daily focus minutes

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Charts for weekly/monthly focus time trends, category distribution pie chart, average quality over time, peak productivity hours bar chart, completion rate trend, and AI-generated insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of duration for all sessions logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todaySessionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of focus sessions completed today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayAverageQuality
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average focus quality rating (1-5) across today's sessions

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of daily focus goal achieved (todayTotalMinutes / dailyGoalMinutes), capped at 1.0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one completed full session meeting the minimum daily threshold

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total focus minutes for the current calendar week (Mon-Sun)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in total focus minutes this week vs previous week. Positive means improvement

viewModelComputedProperties.name: completionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of sessions where completedFull is true, over the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageDistractions
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average number of distractions per session over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Most-used category by total minutes in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: peakHour
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Hour of day (0-23) with the highest average focus quality, computed from all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (category, totalMinutes) pairs for the current week, sorted descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily focus minutes for the last 7 days, used for the bar/line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated insight strings: streak status, quality trend, best time of day, completion rate change, distraction trend, category shift alerts

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestSession
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Maximum single-session duration in minutes over the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: deepWorkRatio
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of total focus time spent in deepWork session type vs all other types, last 30 days

dailyGoal.description: Target total focus minutes per day. Based on pomodoro research, 8 pomodoros (200 min) is a strong day. Default to 120 min (about 5 pomodoros) as an achievable starting goal.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if the user logged at least one session with completedFull=true AND total focus minutes >= 25 (one full pomodoro). Streak breaks if any calendar day (midnight to midnight) fails this condition.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track three trends: (1) Weekly focus minutes vs previous week as percentage change, (2) Rolling 7-day average quality score vs previous 7-day window, (3) Completion rate over last 14 days split into two 7-day halves for comparison. Flag improvements > 10% as positive insights and declines > 15% as alerts.
insights: Streak milestone alerts (3, 7, 14, 30 days) with motivational framing
Peak productivity window: identify the 2-hour block with highest average quality and suggest scheduling deep work there
Distraction trend: compare this week's average distractions per session to last week, flag if rising
Category balance: warn if one category exceeds 70% of total time (potential burnout risk)
Quality-duration correlation: detect if longer sessions (>45 min) correlate with lower quality, suggest shorter pomodoros
Completion rate insight: if rate drops below 70%, suggest reducing planned duration
Deep work ratio: celebrate if >60% of time is deep work, nudge if below 40%
Weekly personal best: highlight if this week's total exceeds any previous week
